title: Trump calls off Witkoff, Kushner trip to Pakistan for Iran peace talks
summary_full: The president’s announcement came after Iranian officials left Pakistan on Saturday after downplaying the prospect of direct talks with U.S. officials on a deal.
summary_public: The president’s announcement came after Iranian officials left Pakistan on Saturday after downplaying the prospect of direct talks with U.S. officials on a deal.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: downplaying the prospect of direct talks with U.S. officials on a deal.
